​

Please forward your resume to hr@queensmanor.ca and we will keep you in mind for future postings.

Why Join Our Team?

​

First of all, we are a team, enthusiastically pursuing our goal of becoming not only the residence of choice, but the employer of choice. We are committed to listening to each other and helping each other succeed.

​

About Liverpool, Nova Scotia

​

We feel blessed to call Liverpool our home. Our lovely community, situated on the south shore of Nova Scotia on the Atlantic coast (about 75 minutes drive from Halifax), offers lots of culture, restaurants and cafes emphasizing local products, the historic Astor Theatre, affordable real estate, beautiful beaches nearby, and is just a short drive to Kejimkujik National Park, designated a National Historic Site of Canada. Liverpool is a cohesive community that often gathers together in celebration, and who time and time again demonstrate their commitment to keeping local attractions and historic sites alive and well.   It’s also a great community for families, with Queens
